text.title: Retargeting / Remarketing Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real ads-retargeting engagements. Each pairs a symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Retargeting = 'all visitors 30d'; CPA flat; no recovery lift.
antipattern.fix: Build the 5-tier intent ladder; tailor message per tier.

antipattern.symptom: Past purchasers see the same acquisition ad; refunds + complaints.
antipattern.fix: Wire pixel.Purchase event → exclusion audience refreshed daily.

antipattern.symptom: All segments capped at 3/wk; cart abandoners under-touched, recovery low.
antipattern.root-cause: One cap applied across the funnel.
antipattern.fix: Per-stage frequency cap matrix; cart abandoners up to 7/wk.
